name: Psychosocial Stress
definition: Chronic or acute stress from social, psychological, or environmental sources. Includes childhood adversity, discrimination, social isolation, financial strain, trauma, and major life events. Affects mental health, behavior, and physiologic stress responses.

systems_affected.mechanism_summary: Cortisol, HPA axis; anxiety, depression, psychosis risk

sensitive_windows.mechanism_rationale: Identity formation; stress sensitivity; trauma effects
